title: OSF UI
description: Runtime and overlay behavior for the OSF UI framework itself.

settings.label: Open / close key
settings.hint: Press to rebind the key that opens and closes the overlay.

settings.label: Disable player controls while open
settings.hint: Freezes movement, camera, and gamepad/XInput while a menu is open. Off leaves the game controllable behind the overlay.

settings.label: Cursor speed
settings.hint: Software-cursor fallback only; the hardware pointer uses your system sensitivity.
